// What we offer

Everything You Need
to Start Mining

From single-unit buyers to industrial-scale deployments — HashVault Pro has you covered.

🏆
Top-Tier Hardware

Bitmain Antminer, MicroBT Whatsminer, Jasminer, and custom GPU rigs — all tested before shipment.

🚚
Fast Global Shipping

Same-day dispatch on in-stock items. Worldwide delivery with full tracking and insurance.

🛡️
Warranty Included

All units come with a minimum 6-month hardware warranty. Extended plans available.

🔧
Expert Support

Our mining engineers are available 24/7 via email, phone, and live chat for setup and troubleshooting.

🇭🇰
Direct from Hong Kong

We have direct agreements with manufacturers in Hong Kong — no intermediaries, no inflated margins. You pay factory-close prices.

📊
ROI-First Selection

We only stock hardware that makes economic sense today. Every unit in our catalog is vetted for real-world profitability at current network difficulty.

// Process

Three Steps to
Your First Hash

01
Browse & Choose

Explore our catalog. Use our ROI calculator or ask our team which unit fits your power budget and goals.

02
Order & Pay Securely

Check out with crypto or bank transfer. Receive order confirmation and tracking within 24 hours.

03
Plug In & Mine

Your rig arrives pre-tested and ready to configure. Our team guides you through pool setup and first connection.

// Common questions

FAQ

We ship worldwide including the US, EU, UK, Canada, Australia, and most of Asia. Shipping costs and timelines vary by destination — contact us for a quote before ordering to remote locations.
All units carry a minimum 6-month hardware warranty from HashVault Pro. Extended 12- or 24-month plans are available at checkout. Warranty covers manufacturing defects and hardware failure under normal operating conditions.
ROI depends on electricity cost, network difficulty, and coin price. Our team offers a free profitability consultation — just contact us with your power rate and location, and we'll model out realistic projections for the equipment you're considering.
We accept Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USDT, USDC, and bank wire transfer (SWIFT/SEPA). Crypto payments are processed instantly. Wire transfers require 1–2 business days to clear before shipment.
We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for units in original, unused condition. If a unit has a defect confirmed within the warranty period, we will replace or repair it at no cost. Please see our full Terms of Service for details.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service Refund Policy
Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2025

1. Who We Are

HashVault Pro OÜ ("HashVault Pro", "we", "us", or "our") is a company registered in Estonia (Reg. No. 16452378), with a registered office at Roosikrantsi 2, 10119 Tallinn, Estonia. We operate the website hashvaultpro.com and sell mining equipment.

2. Data We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, including: full name, email address, phone number, shipping and billing address, payment method details (processed securely by third-party payment processors — we do not store card data), and any communications you send us.

We also collect standard server logs: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and timestamps.

3. How We Use Your Data

We use your data to: process and fulfill your orders; communicate about your orders and support requests; send marketing emails (only with your consent, which you may withdraw at any time); improve our website and services; comply with legal obligations.

4. Legal Basis (GDPR)

For EU/EEA residents, we process data under the following legal bases: contract performance (order fulfillment), legitimate interests (fraud prevention, service improvement), consent (marketing communications), and legal obligation (accounting, tax).

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We share it only with service providers who help operate our business (shipping couriers, payment processors, email platforms), and only to the extent necessary. All processors are bound by data processing agreements.

6. Data Retention

We retain order data for 7 years as required by Estonian and EU accounting law. Marketing consent data is retained until you withdraw consent. Server logs are retained for 90 days.

7. Your Rights

Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, and to object to or restrict certain processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at: privacy@hashvaultpro.com.

8. Cookies

We use essential cookies for site operation and, with your consent, analytics cookies. You may adjust cookie preferences in your browser settings at any time.

9. Contact

For privacy matters: privacy@hashvaultpro.com · HashVault Pro OÜ, Roosikrantsi 2, 10119 Tallinn, Estonia · Phone: +372 600 1234

Terms of Service

Last updated: January 1, 2025

1. Agreement

By accessing hashvaultpro.com or placing an order, you agree to these Terms of Service. These terms constitute a binding agreement between you and HashVault Pro OÜ, Roosikrantsi 2, 10119 Tallinn, Estonia (Reg. No. 16452378).

2. Products & Orders

All products are described in good faith. Specifications may change based on manufacturer updates. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders at our discretion, including cases of suspected fraud or pricing error. Orders are confirmed upon receipt of full payment.

3. Pricing & Payment

All prices are displayed in USD and exclude VAT where applicable. Accepted payment methods include Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USDT, USDC, and bank wire transfer. Cryptocurrency prices are locked at the time of payment. Wire transfer orders are held until funds are received.

4. Shipping & Delivery

We ship worldwide. Estimated delivery times are indicative and not guaranteed. Title and risk of loss transfer to the buyer upon handover to the shipping carrier. Import duties, taxes, and customs fees are the buyer's responsibility.

5. Warranty

All units include a 6-month hardware warranty unless otherwise stated. The warranty covers manufacturing defects and hardware failure under normal operating conditions. It does not cover damage from overclocking, improper power supply, physical damage, water damage, or unauthorized modification.

6. Returns & Refunds

Returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery for unused, unopened units in original packaging. Opened units may be returned only if defective. Refunds are issued within 10 business days of receiving the returned item. Buyer pays return shipping unless the item is defective.

7. Limitation of Liability

HashVault Pro's liability is limited to the value of the goods purchased. We are not liable for loss of mining revenue, network downtime, cryptocurrency price fluctuations, or consequential damages of any kind.

8. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Estonia. Disputes shall be resolved in Estonian courts, without prejudice to your rights under applicable consumer protection laws in your jurisdiction.

9. Contact

For legal matters: legal@hashvaultpro.com · HashVault Pro OÜ, Roosikrantsi 2, 10119 Tallinn, Estonia · Phone: +372 600 1234

Refund Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2025

1. Return Window

You may return eligible items within 14 calendar days of the delivery date. To initiate a return, email support@hashvaultpro.com with your order number and reason for return.

2. Eligible Items

Items are eligible for return if they are: unused and in original packaging (for non-defective returns), or defective / not as described. Items that have been powered on for more than 24 hours are considered "used" unless defective.

3. Non-Eligible Items

The following are not eligible for return: units damaged due to improper installation, overclocking, incorrect power supply, or physical abuse; custom-configured rigs built to order; items returned outside the 14-day window without prior written agreement.

4. Return Shipping

For defective items, HashVault Pro covers return shipping. For non-defective returns (change of mind), the buyer covers return shipping costs. Items must be shipped with a trackable method and insured for their full value.

5. Refund Process

Upon receiving and inspecting the returned item, we will notify you of approval or rejection. Approved refunds are issued within 10 business days via the original payment method. Crypto refunds are issued at the exchange rate at the time of refund processing.

6. Warranty Claims

For items within the warranty period, defective units will be repaired or replaced at our discretion at no cost to you. If a replacement is not available, a full refund will be issued.

7. Contact

For refund inquiries: support@hashvaultpro.com · +372 600 1234 · Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00 CET
